purpose: Track whether PR-130 June data has both committed records and a reusable acquisition path, so future updates do not restart from scratch.

ready_for_next_update.remaining_work: Promote manual month extraction to a parameterized annual-calendar parser.
Keep validating that the extractor reproduces the committed full June record set.
Promote manual month extraction to a parameterized schedule parser.
Promote the month query into an extractor that accepts year/month.
Keep checking official season calendar before adding June records. Do not invent meetings.
Promote PDF month extraction into a reusable annual PDF parser.
Verify future month filtering before PR-131.
Promote the fixture extraction into a reusable source route if future months are needed.
Promote manual month extraction into a reusable fixture-list parser.
Keep legacy/no-active-racing status checks. Do not invent June meetings.
Promote PDF table extraction to a repeatable NZTR programme parser.
Promote page extraction into a reusable month parser and verify visible coverage.
Continue investigating a full national Standardbred Canada export before PR-131.
Keep using the national South African racing calendar route while verifying operator coverage labels.
Promote full-calendar extraction into a reusable month parser.
Promote Race Diary/PDF reconciliation into a reusable NSW month route.

progress_not_ready_for_calendar.current_coverage: Queensland and NSW are promoted via state/manual routes. VIC, SA, WA, TAS, NT remain blocked because captured routes do not expose complete June 2026 full-month rows. ACT rows are represented through Racing NSW Canberra Acton records and were not duplicated.
progress_not_ready_for_calendar.remaining_work: Find full-month official source routes for the remaining states before promotion.

progress_not_ready_for_calendar.current_coverage: Official and legacy routes were checked, but no complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse month table was captured.
progress_not_ready_for_calendar.remaining_work: Find no-login month-capable Australian harness calendar rows before promotion.

progress_not_ready_for_calendar.current_coverage: 18 official June 2026 club-date rows. 16 rows are mappable with high confidence; 3 rows remain blocked as records: Invercargill on 2026-06-01 and 2026-06-11, and Forbury Park on 2026-06-21.
progress_not_ready_for_calendar.remaining_work: Capture official racecourse text for the remaining blocked rows before promoting HRNZ to manual records.

progress_not_ready_for_calendar.current_coverage: Official links and subscription route confirmed, but no captured no-login source provides complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows.
progress_not_ready_for_calendar.remaining_work: Find a no-login France Galop full-month source/API/ICS before promotion.

important_findings: manual-june-2026-*.json files are auto-merged by scripts/merge-pr-130-manual-june-records.mjs, so partial files must stay under progress-june-2026-* until full coverage is verified.
Australia now has promoted Queensland and NSW full-month records; other states remain blocked unless a full-month official source is captured.
HRNZ Winton was resolved to Central Southland Raceway, but HRNZ still cannot be promoted because Invercargill and Forbury blocked rows remain.
France FNCH has promising day-row structure and month UI, but no captured full-month endpoint yet.
USA, KRA, and Harness Australia remain progress-only because current checks did not capture complete official June 2026 row sets.

South Africa has a promoted national Thoroughbred calendar via the Gold Circle South African racing calendar route; NHRA/4Racing route labels still need operator-specific verification if they are kept as separate groups.
